title: Roles
description: Schema for shared/roles.csv. Roles define the primary energy-system coverage obligations, topology positions, balance types, output units, residual coverage obligations, and default representation kinds.

parent_role_id.description: Parent role identifier when this role is activated by a decomposition representation; blank for top-level coverage obligations.

role_kind.description: Whether the role has modeled methods, represents explicit residual coverage, or is a carbon-removal role.

balance_type.description: Balance or accounting requirement satisfied by the role, such as service demand, commodity supply, intermediate conversion, residual accounting, or carbon removal.

output_unit.description: Output or accounting unit for role activity.

coverage_obligation.description: Coverage obligation class. Required top-level roles and explicit residual top-level roles are active unless scoped out; required decomposition children are active when their parent decomposition representation is selected.

default_representation_kind.description: Kind of the default representation selected for this role before scenario-specific representation choices are applied.
